title: HOOK 1 — Birthday reveal (blindfold off)
prompt: Wide shot in @dream-house. @Mama on the LEFT gently guides @Sara into the frame from screen-right with one hand, Sara's eyes covered by Mama's other hand. The giant pink-and-purple doll Dream House sits center, wrapped with a huge sparkly bow. Balloons float overhead. Mama: "Three… two… one… open your eyes, birthday girl!" Sara (eyes opening, jaw drops): "Mama!!!" Bright morning sunlight, party music sting.
